title: Understand a pending charge or hold on your account
text: A pending charge is an authorization the merchant placed to reserve funds; it isn't final, and your available balance drops until it posts or falls off. Hotels, gas stations, and car rentals often place larger temporary holds that release within a few days. If you see two pending entries for one purchase, one is usually a temporary hold that will disappear on its own. If a pending charge hasn't posted or cleared after 7 days, contact support and we'll check its status.
